summary: Classified the 10 live inventory PRs independently. Nine PRs remain non-mutating keep_independent items for normal maintainer or author follow-up. PR #89296 is security-routed because deterministic validation identified it as security-sensitive; no close, merge, fix, or label action is planned for it.

actions.reason: Inventory-only shard with no shared canonical; close, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths are disabled or unsafe for an active maintainer draft PR.
Active maintainer draft PR with conflict/dirty state; keep open rather than closing or merging from an inventory shard.
Active maintainer draft PR with focused implementation; no boring duplicate, low-signal, or superseded closeout is permitted by this job.
Focused maintainer draft PR requiring technical review; no close/merge/fix action is allowed in this inventory shard.
Active author follow-up and review-bot findings mean it should stay open; close/merge/fix are outside this job.
Active author follow-up with actionable review comments; keep open and independent for normal maintainer/author review.
Broad draft feature/refactor with failing proof and waiting-on-author state; not a close candidate under this shard.
Focused active maintainer draft PR requiring maintainer review; keep open, no inventory closeout.
Focused active maintainer draft PR with no clear close/supersede gate in this inventory shard.
Security-sensitive PR must be quarantined as an exact ref and routed to central OpenClaw security handling; do not close, label, merge, comment, or open a fix path for this item.
